schedule.description: Story 5 — Red Bull Miami upgrade crisis

stories.title: The F1 April Break — Five Weeks, One Goal: Beat Mercedes in Miami

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Formula 1 is on a 5-week break. But the factories aren't.

Red Bull: emergency RB22 upgrades.
Ferrari: Miami aero test at Monza April 22.
FIA: binding regulation vote April 20.

The 2026 season restarts May 1 in Miami — and nothing will look the same. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

stories.title: Antonelli at 72 Points — History Made, Miami Awaits

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli. 19 years old. Leads F1 by 9 points.

After Japan: Antonelli 72, Russell 63, Leclerc 49, Hamilton 41.

He just became the youngest championship leader in Formula 1 history.

Miami is in 19 days. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Mercedes is running away with the 2026 constructors' title.

Mercedes: 135 pts
Ferrari: 90 pts
McLaren: 46 pts
Red Bull: 16 pts

Three races in. Antonelli is No. 1. The gap to Red Bull is staggering. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

stories.title: FIA April 20 Vote — Eight Days That Could Reshape the 2026 Season

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The FIA votes on April 20 — 8 days away.

What's on the table:
• Super clip: 250 → 350kW
• Energy recovery: 9 → 6MJ
• ADUO safety net for struggling PU makers

If passed, Miami (May 1) could run under NEW rules. This is huge. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

stories.title: Ferrari's Miami Blueprint — Monza Test April 22 With Hamilton and Leclerc

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Ferrari. Monza. April 22.

Hamilton and Leclerc will test their Miami aero package — revised floor, new cooling, the "Macarena" rear wing.

200km to find time. 45 points behind Mercedes. Ferrari is not giving up. #ScuderiaFerrari #F1Fanrecap

stories.title: Red Bull's Make-or-Break Miami Upgrade — RB22 Needs a Miracle

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Red Bull is 1 second per lap slower than Mercedes.

0.8s is chassis. 0.2s is the power unit.

They're bringing a major upgrade package to Miami. This is their season on the line — and Verstappen's future at the team depends on it. #F1Fanrecap #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
NLS2: Won, then disqualified.
NLS3: Skipped (team at Paul Ricard).

Next up for Verstappen: 24H Nurburgring Qualifiers — April 18-19.

He said it himself: the Nordschleife "brings a big smile." One more shot at Nurburgring glory. #F1Fanrecap #Verstappen

stories.title: Miami Grand Prix 2026 — Everything You Need to Know

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
19 days until the Miami Grand Prix.

May 1-3. Sprint weekend. Round 6.

Antonelli leads. Verstappen needs a miracle. Ferrari has a new aero package. The FIA might change the rules before we even get there.

Miami 2026 is going to be SOMETHING. #F1Fanrecap #MiamiGP
